summary: Full code audit of Gilbertus Albans project. Assessed structure, code quality, security. Overall grade: B+. Identified 6 priority fixes.
Implemented all 6 priority fixes from audit: SQL injection elimination, docker exec removal, requirements.txt completion, API error handling, API timeouts, parser unit tests (39 tests, all passing).

Diagnosed DB reset (WSL2 restart + bind-mount race condition). Restored Postgres from backup. Migrated to Docker named volumes. Added auto-restore guard (@reboot cron). Rewrote backup script with validation + Qdrant snapshot API. Qdrant data lost — reindex script prepared.

V1 completion sprint. Qdrant reindexing started (24k/119k running in bg). Implemented daily/weekly summary pipeline + POST /summary/generate and /summary/query endpoints. 57 tests (39 parser + 18 integration), all passing. .env.example created, ARCHITECTURE.md updated, /docs verified. Smoke tested all endpoints. Backup system verified (Postgres 79MB + Qdrant 326MB snapshot).

From empty DB to fully operational mentat. V1 complete. WhatsApp live + corporate email + Teams + Plaud + Whisper. 25+ commits, 100+ files, 15 API endpoints, 30 insights, 64 tests. Omnius MVP ready. Gilbertus answers questions from 120k chunks on WhatsApp.

Faza 0 (19/19) + Faza 1 (6/6) + Fazy 2-5 code done. 3 extraction bugs fixed (infinite loop, no partitioning, conservative prompt). Employee evaluations (4 people). Masterplan V3: 5 phases A-E. QC agents deployed. Plaud fix. Teams sync fix. 18 MCP tools.
